name: FastRouter

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: Privacy Policy states prompt data is stored temporarily for routing and typically deleted after 7 days; usage logs may be retained for up to 90 days; other information is retained while the account is active or as needed to provide services and comply with legal obligations.
dataUsage.details: FastRouter says it shares prompts and related request data with third-party model providers to fulfill API requests. Terms of Service grant FastRouter a limited, non-exclusive, worldwide, sublicensable, perpetual, royalty-free license to host, store, transfer, display, perform, reproduce, adapt, translate, prepare derivative works of, and distribute inputs and outputs to provide services, debugging, optimize and improve services/API keys, and meet legal or regulatory obligations.

notes: FastRouter publishes a privacy policy and terms, but no primary-source DPA/AVV, SCC, sub-processor list, security certification, or EU data residency documentation was found. Its documentation and privacy policy indicate requests are routed to third-party model providers and can be automatically routed across multiple providers, so EU-only inference cannot be confirmed and inference can leave the EU.
